name: Night Blade
short_description: Night Blade is a Multiplayer, Fast-Paced Arena Fight game. Players(2-8) fight in various game modes to win in a cyberpunk arena. Every win will increase the rank of player. Higher ranks, higher rewards.
detailed_description:
Night Blade is a Multiplayer, Fast-Paced Arena Fight game. Players(2-8) fight in various game modes to win in a cyberpunk arena. Every win will increase the rank of player. Higher ranks, higher rewards.

Night Blade is a product of single developer. Take a place in cyberpunk world called Cryptex where riots turned into parties and fight clubs. Contains different types of characters, skills, abilities to fight. It provides a high voltage energetic game experience. Get ready for the pit.

GAME MODES:
- Football: Players hit the ball and try to put it on enemy base.
- Capture The Flag: Players steal the enemy flag and bring enemy flag to their base while defending their own flag.
- Crown: Players grab the crown and they keep it as much as they can without dying.
- Fight: Teams fight with each other and get points for every kill they get.
- Capture The Point: Players get control of a point and defend it.

supported_languages:
English*, Turkish, French, Italian, German, Spanish - Spain, Simplified Chinese, Japanese, Korean, Spanish - Latin America, Polish, Norwegian, Portuguese - Portugal, Russian, Ukrainian, Greek
*languages with full audio support
